popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Sire de Coucy and Marle; Count of Amiens.  Went on the 1st Crusade.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORTHERN%20FRANCE.htm#BeatrixCoucydiedafter1156MEvrardIIIBrete as of 4/11/2016

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Marle-Coucy於1073年出生時，他的父親Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves32歲，母親Adele de Coucy25歲。他於1101年與Ida de Hainaut結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1130年11月9日在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年57歲，埋葬在法國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Marle-Coucy was born in 1073, his father, Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves, was 32 and his mother, Adele de Coucy, was 25. He married Ida de Hainaut in 1101. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 November 1130, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Marle-Coucy est né en 1073, son père, Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Adele de Coucy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ida de Hainaut en 1101. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1130, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Marle-Coucy 1073 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves 32 und seine Mutter Adele de Coucy 25. Er hat 1101 Ida de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1130 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Marle-Coucy è nato il nel 1073, il suo padre, Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Adele de Coucy, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ida de Hainaut nel 1101. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1130, nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Marle-Coucyが1073年に生まれた時，父Enguerrand I de Coucy-Bovesは32歳，母Adele de Coucyは25歳であった。1101年にIda de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1130年11月9日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで57歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Marle-Coucy(이)가 1073년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Coucy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1101년 Ida de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1130년 11월 9일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Marle-Coucy nasceu em 1073, seu pai, Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Coucy, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida de Hainaut em 1101. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1130, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Marle-Coucy родился в 1073 г., его отцу по имени Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Adele de Coucy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida de Hainaut в 1101 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 ноября 1130 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Marle-Coucy nació en 1073, su papá, Enguerrand I de Coucy-Boves, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Adele de Coucy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ida de Hainaut en 1101. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1130, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
